misconceptions: Confusing map projection distortions with real distances
Using demographic transition stages without linking to development context
Treating culture as static and non-diffusing
Memorizing urban models without applying to a real city pattern
paper_rules: MCQ frequently includes maps, charts, and aerial/landscape images
FRQs: define terms, apply models, and explain spatial processes with examples
Scale matters: local/regional/global answers must match the prompt
Name specific places when prompts ask for examples
units_summary: U3 Cultural Patterns and Processes (w≈0.13, q=65)
U4 Political Patterns and Processes (w≈0.13, q=65)
U5 Agriculture and Rural Land Use (w≈0.13, q=65)
U6 Cities and Urban Land Use (w≈0.17, q=85)
U7 Industrial and Economic Development (w≈0.23, q=115)
